title: Cigar Lake Flood -> Uranium Supply Shock
summary: Flooding at Cameco's Cigar Lake project delayed one of the world's largest uranium mines and tightened uranium supply expectations.
mechanism: A major project delay removed expected future uranium supply from the market, forcing utilities to reprice scarce pounds.
causal_chain: mine flood halts project timeline
expected uranium supply falls
uranium prices rise on tighter future availability

forecast.note: Bullish uranium on delayed mine startup.

outcome.realized_note: Uranium prices moved sharply higher into the 2007 bull peak amid supply concerns.
outcome.reversal_note: Later reversal followed demand disappointment and new supply.

title: 2007 Uranium Bubble Peak -> Sharp Mean Reversion
summary: Uranium prices spiked to an extreme 2007 peak on speculative buying and project delays before collapsing.
mechanism: Thin spot liquidity and supply anxiety created a squeeze that overshot fundamental demand, setting up a later crash.
causal_chain: tight spot liquidity amplifies uranium buying
prices overshoot fundamental demand
market collapses as buyers retreat

outcome.realized_note: Uranium prices reversed sharply after the 2007 speculative peak.
outcome.reversal_note: The crash became structural after Fukushima-related demand damage.

title: China Rare Earth Export Controls -> Strategic Metals Spike
summary: China's tightening of rare-earth export controls triggered a sharp rally in strategic magnet metals used in clean-energy supply chains.
mechanism: Concentrated Chinese supply meant export limits immediately tightened global availability and forced strategic repricing.
causal_chain: China tightens export controls
global buyers fear supply scarcity
rare-earth prices spike on strategic supply shock

forecast.note: Bullish rare earths and non-China alternatives.

outcome.realized_note: Rare-earth prices surged before later policy adjustment and substitution reduced extremes.
outcome.reversal_note: Prices reversed as supply responded and policy pressure increased.

title: Fukushima -> Uranium Demand Regime Break
summary: The Fukushima disaster caused a structural bear market in uranium as Japan shut reactors and other countries rethought nuclear policy.
mechanism: A major nuclear accident reduced expected reactor demand for uranium and redirected power demand into fossil substitutes.
causal_chain: nuclear accident shocks public and regulators
reactor shutdowns reduce uranium demand expectations
uranium prices fall while LNG demand rises

forecast.note: Bearish uranium; bullish LNG substitute demand.

outcome.realized_note: Uranium entered a prolonged bear market after Fukushima.
outcome.reversal_note: The market only recovered years later on supply cuts and pro-nuclear policy revival.

title: DRC Supply Risk -> Cobalt Bull Market
summary: Concentrated cobalt supply in the DRC and rising EV battery demand supported a strong cobalt rally into 2017-18.
mechanism: Supply concentration in one politically risky geography collided with accelerating battery demand growth.
causal_chain: battery demand rises with EV adoption
market focuses on DRC supply concentration
cobalt prices rise on scarcity premium

outcome.realized_note: Cobalt prices surged before later chemistry substitution and new supply eased the market.
outcome.reversal_note: Reversal followed battery chemistry shifts and supply response.

title: Chile Strike Risk -> Copper Supply Premium
summary: Strike risk and disruptions at major Chilean copper mines repeatedly added a supply premium to copper prices.
mechanism: Large mine labor risks can remove meaningful global copper supply and tighten balances quickly.
causal_chain: labor dispute threatens key mine output
supply disruption risk rises
copper prices embed scarcity premium

forecast.note: Bullish copper during acute strike risk.

outcome.realized_note: Copper repeatedly reacted upward to Chilean disruption risk.

title: Indonesia Nickel Ore Restrictions -> Nickel Tightness
summary: Indonesia's ore export restrictions supported nickel prices by tightening feedstock availability for the stainless and battery supply chains.
mechanism: Export controls restricted ore availability and forced downstream players to reprice future supply tightness.
causal_chain: Indonesia restricts nickel ore exports
feedstock availability tightens
nickel prices rise on supply concerns

forecast.note: Bullish nickel on policy-driven supply constraint.

outcome.realized_note: Nickel markets remained sensitive to Indonesia policy due to supply concentration.
outcome.reversal_note: Later reversals reflected new Indonesian downstream capacity.

title: EV Demand Surge -> Lithium Carbonate Shortage
summary: Rapid EV adoption outran near-term lithium processing and mine capacity, producing a major lithium price spike.
mechanism: Battery demand expanded faster than brine, hard-rock, and refining capacity could respond.
causal_chain: EV demand accelerates sharply
refining and mine supply lag
lithium prices spike on processing bottlenecks

forecast.note: Bullish lithium and battery material spreads.

outcome.realized_note: Lithium prices soared through 2021-22 before new supply and weaker EV demand expectations moderated the market.
outcome.reversal_note: Sharp reversal followed in 2023 as supply responded.

sources.title: Lithium Price Surge and EV Demand

title: SPUT Launch -> Uranium Spot Squeeze
summary: The launch and aggressive spot buying of the Sprott Physical Uranium Trust withdrew pounds from the market and reignited uranium prices.
mechanism: A financial vehicle buying and sequestering physical uranium tightened already-thin spot liquidity.
causal_chain: SPUT launches and buys physical uranium
spot supply available to market shrinks
uranium prices rally on inventory withdrawal

forecast.note: Bullish uranium and miners on spot tightening.

outcome.realized_note: Uranium prices and equities rallied strongly as SPUT absorbed spot material.
outcome.reversal_note: Pace moderated as trust issuance slowed.

title: French Nuclear Outages -> European Power and Gas Stress
summary: Corrosion and maintenance issues in France's nuclear fleet reduced baseload power supply and intensified Europe's power and gas crisis.
mechanism: Lower nuclear output forced more gas and coal burn, tightening fuel markets and power spreads.
causal_chain: French reactor outages reduce nuclear generation
Europe relies more on gas-fired power
power and gas prices rise on tighter balances

forecast.note: Bullish power and gas; supportive of uranium narrative over time.

outcome.realized_note: European power and gas stress intensified as French nuclear output underperformed.
outcome.reversal_note: Partial easing followed better availability and lower demand.

sources.title: EDF Nuclear Availability and Power Prices

title: Kazakh Sulfuric Acid Constraints -> Uranium Supply Risk
summary: Kazakhstan uranium producers warned that sulfuric acid shortages could constrain ISR uranium output.
mechanism: ISR uranium production depends on sulfuric acid availability; input bottlenecks therefore tighten mine output.
causal_chain: key chemical input becomes constrained
ISR mine output risk rises
uranium market prices tighter supply

forecast.note: Bullish uranium on production constraint risk.

outcome.realized_note: Kazakh supply concerns supported uranium prices and scarcity narratives.
outcome.reversal_note: Risk premium fluctuated with input availability.

title: LME Nickel Short Squeeze -> Market Dysfunction
summary: A historic nickel short squeeze forced the LME to suspend trading and cancel trades in March 2022.
mechanism: Large short positioning collided with thin liquidity and war-related supply fears, creating disorderly forced buying.
causal_chain: supply fears and positioning collide
short covering overwhelms available liquidity
nickel spikes and exchange halts trading

forecast.note: Violent upside squeeze risk once shorts become trapped.

outcome.realized_note: Nickel prices exploded higher and the LME halted trading.

title: Niger Coup -> Uranium Supply Risk Premium
summary: The 2023 coup in Niger added a geopolitical risk premium to uranium because Niger is an important supplier to Europe.
mechanism: Political instability in a concentrated supplier raised fears of disruption to uranium mine output and export flows.
causal_chain: coup raises political risk at uranium supplier
export or mine continuity comes into question
uranium prices embed geopolitical premium

forecast.note: Bullish uranium on Niger risk premium.

outcome.realized_note: The coup supported uranium risk pricing, though full supply disruption did not fully materialize.
outcome.reversal_note: Premium ebbed as immediate supply interruption proved limited.

title: China Graphite Export Controls -> Battery Input Risk
summary: China's graphite export restrictions raised strategic risk for battery anode supply chains.
mechanism: High supply concentration meant export licensing immediately raised non-China supply urgency and risk premiums.
causal_chain: China imposes export controls
buyers reassess anode material availability
graphite and supply-chain alternatives reprice higher

forecast.note: Bullish strategic graphite and ex-China alternatives.

outcome.realized_note: Export-control risk increased battery raw-material diversification urgency and strategic pricing.
outcome.reversal_note: Spot effects were muted by inventory and existing contracts.

title: Energy Transition Copper Tightness -> Structural Bull Narrative
summary: A widening gap between copper demand from electrification and constrained mine supply supported a structural bullish copper narrative in 2024.
mechanism: Electrification and grid buildout demand grew faster than permitting and mine development could respond.
causal_chain: electrification boosts expected copper demand
mine pipeline remains constrained
copper prices rise on structural deficit narrative

forecast.note: Bullish copper on structural transition demand.

outcome.realized_note: Copper rallied strongly in 2024 as structural deficit narratives gained traction.
outcome.priced_in_note: Partly priced by prior transition enthusiasm, but supply disappointments reinforced the move.
